data.biography:
David Bowditch Morse (born October 11, 1953) is an American actor. Morse became widely known for his role as Dr. Jack "Boomer" Morrison in the NBC medical drama series St. Elsewhere (1982–88). Some other notable roles are in The Negotiator, The Good Son, Horns, Contact, The Green Mile, Dancer in the Dark, Disturbia, The Hurt Locker, The Long Kiss Goodnight, The Rock and 12 Monkeys.

In 2006, he had a recurring role as Detective Michael Tritter on the medical drama House for which he received an Emmy Award nomination. He portrayed George Washington in the 2008 HBO Miniseries John Adams, which garnered him a second Emmy nomination. He has received acclaim for his portrayal of Uncle Peck on the Off-Broadway play How I Learned to Drive for which he earned a Drama Desk and Obie Award. He also had success on Broadway, portraying James "Sharky" Harkin in The Seafarer.  From 2010 to 2013, he portrayed Terry Colson, an honest police officer in a corrupt New Orleans police department, on the HBO series Treme. Morse appeared in the WGN America series Outsiders (2016–17), the Showtime miniseries Escape at Dannemora (2018), the Netflix comedy drama series The Chair (2021), and the Apple TV mystery series The Last Thing He Told Me (2023-2026).

David Bowditch Morse (Beverly, Massachusetts, Amerikai Egyesült Államok 1953. október 11. –) amerikai színész, rendező, író és énekes. Első szerepét a St. Elsewhere (1982-1988) orvosi sorozatban kapta. Dr. Jack "Boomer" Morrison karakterét személyesítette meg. Színészi karrierjét olyan sikeres filmekben folytatta, mint a Kapcsolat, a Halálsoron, a Disturbia, A szikla, a Nincs alku, a 12 majom, a 16 utca vagy a Féktelen harag.

David Bowditch Morse (né le 11 octobre 1953) est un acteur américain de théâtre, de télévision et de cinéma. Il a d'abord attiré l'attention nationale en tant que Dr Jack Morrison dans le drame médical St.Ailleurs de 1982 à 1988. Morse a poursuivi sa carrière cinématographique avec des rôles dans Dancer in the Dark, The Negotiator, The Green Mile, Disturbia, The Long Kiss Goodnight, The Crossing Guard, The Rock, Extreme Measures, Twelve Monkeys, 16 Blocks et Hounddog.

En 2006, Morse a eu un rôle récurrent en tant que détective Michael Tritter dans le drame médical House pour lequel il a reçu une nomination aux Emmy Awards. Morse a dépeint George Washington dans la mini-série HBO 2008 John Adams, qui lui a valu une deuxième nomination aux Emmy. Morse a été acclamé pour son interprétation d'Oncle Peck dans la pièce Off-Broadway How I Learned to Drive pour laquelle il a remporté un Drama Desk et Obie Award. Il a également eu du succès à Broadway, incarnant James "Sharky" Harkin dans The Seafarer. À partir de 2011, Morse est un habitué de la série HBO, "Treme".

Największą popularność przyniosły mu role w filmach i serialach telewizyjnych. W latach 1982 - 1988 występował jako doktor Jack "Boomer" Morrison w serialu "St. Elsewhere". Jednak David jest zdania, że granie w klasycznych sztukach, pomaga w szlifowaniu techniki. Prawie sześć lat występował w Boston Repertory Theatre. W Nowym Jorku zaczął odnosić sukcesy w teatrach off-braodwayowskich. Do jego największych osiągnięć teatralnych należy rola w przedstawieniu "How I Learned to Drive".Na srebrnym ekranie debiutował w "Inside Moves" (1980) Richarda Donnera. W 1991 David Morse i Viggo Mortensen zagrali skłóconych braci w debiucie reżyserskim Seana Penna "Indiański biegacz". Gra również w kolejnym filmie Penna pt. "Obsesja" (1995). Do ważnych kreacji filmowych należy zaliczyć rolę w "Wariatce z Alabamy" (1999) Antonio Banderasa.

David Morse (Hamilton, Massachusetts, 11 de Outubro de 1953) é um ator norte-americano. David Morse é filho de Jacquelyn (professora) e de Charles Morse (encarregado de vendas). Tem três irmãs. Casou-se com Susan Duff a 19 de Junho de 1982. O casal teve três filhos e reside atualmente em Filadélfia, Pensilvânia. Em 1982, tornou-se conhecido ao interpretar o papel de um compassivo médico que trabalhava num hospital público na série de televisiva St. Elsewhere, onde esteve até 1988. Outros actores dessa série foram: Ronny Cox, Ed Begley Jr., Bruce Greenwood, Mark Harmon e Terence Knox.

David Bowditch Morse (* 11. Oktober 1953 in Hamilton, Massachusetts) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Morse begann seine Laufbahn am Theater. Zwischen 1971 und 1977 trat er in über dreißig Bühnenproduktionen auf, in den späteren siebziger Jahren am renommierten Circle Repertory Theatre in New York City. Mit einer Rolle in Richard Donners Max's Bar 1980 begann seine Kinokarriere, die jedoch erst in den späten 1990er Jahren mit Engagements in Filmen wie 12 Monkeys (1995), The Rock (1996), Contact (1997), Verhandlungssache (1998) und The Green Mile (1999) ihren Durchbruch fand.

Дэвид Боудич Морс - американский актёр. Номинант на премии «Эмми» и «Тони». Морс родился в Беверли, штат Массачусетс, в семье школьной учительницы Жаклин и торгового менеджера Чарльза Морса. У него есть три младших сестры. Он получил своё среднее имя, Боудич, в честь математика Нафанаила Боудича. Морс добился известности благодаря роли доктора Джека «Бумера» Моррисон в медицинском драматическом сериале «Сент-Элсвер» (1982-1988), после чего появился с ролями в таких фильмах, как «12 обезьян» (1995), «Долгий поцелуй на ночь» (1996), «Скала» (1996), «Контакт» (1997), «Переговорщик» (1998), «Зелёная миля» (1999), «Танцующая в темноте» (2000) и «Паранойя» (2007). С 2006 по 2007 год Морс имел гостевую роль детектива Майкла Триттера в драматическом сериале «Доктор Хаус», принёсшую ему номинацию на премию «Эмми» в категории «Лучший приглашённый актёр в драматическом телесериале». Год спустя он получил вторую номинацию на премию «Эмми» за роль Джорджа Вашингтона в мини-сериале «Джон Адамс». Наибольшую известность на театральной сцене Морсу принесла роль в офф-бродвейской постановке «Как я научилась водить», за которую он выиграл премии «Драма Деск» и Obie. В 2018 году он получил номинацию на премию «Тони» за роль в пьесе «Продавец льда грядёт».

data.biography:
David Bowditch Morse (nato l'11 ottobre 1953) è un attore americano di teatro, televisione e cinema. Ha attirato l'attenzione nazionale per la prima volta come il dottor Jack Morrison nel dramma medico St. Elsewhere dal 1982 al 1988. Morse ha proseguito la sua carriera cinematografica con ruoli in Dancer in the Dark, The Negotiator, The Green Mile, Disturbia, The Long Kiss Goodnight, The Crossing Guard, The Rock, Extreme Measures, Twelve Monkeys, 16 Blocks e Hounddog.

Nel 2006, Morse ha avuto un ruolo ricorrente come detective Michael Tritter nel dramma medico House, per il quale ha ricevuto una nomination agli Emmy Award. Morse ha interpretato George Washington nella miniserie HBO del 2008 John Adams, che gli è valso una seconda nomination agli Emmy. Morse ha ricevuto consensi per la sua interpretazione di zio Peck nella pièce off-Broadway How I Learned to Drive, per la quale ha ricevuto un Drama Desk e un Obie Award. Ha avuto successo anche a Broadway, interpretando James "Sharky" Harkin in The Seafarer. Dal 2011, Morse è un personaggio fisso nella serie HBO "Treme".

于慧，内地女演员，毕业于上海戏剧学院表演系。

1989年于慧在黄蜀芹执导的电视剧《围城》中饰演汪太太，1994年出演古装历史剧《武则天》，1996年凭借主演的剧情电影《喜莲》获得第3届中国电影华表奖最佳女演员和第17届中国电影金鸡奖最佳女主角 ，2001年主演警匪悬疑剧《插翅难逃》，2002年凭借剧情电影《巧凤》获得第8届中国电影华表奖优秀女演员奖，2011年凭借电视剧《金达莱》获得第三届新农村电视艺术节最佳女主角奖，2016年凭借电影《遥远的约定》获得47届美国纳什维尔国际电影节最佳女主角，2021年12月担任第32届华鼎奖评委。
data.name: 于慧

于慧，內地女演員，畢業於上海戲劇學院表演系。

1989 年于慧在黃蜀芹執導的電視劇《圍城》中飾演汪太太，1994 年出演古裝歷史劇《武則天》，1996 年憑藉主演的劇情電影《喜蓮》獲得第 3 屆中國電影華表獎最佳女演員和第 17 屆中國電影金雞獎最佳女主角 ，2001 年主演警匪懸疑劇《插翅難逃》，2002 年憑藉劇情電影《巧鳳》獲得第 8 屆中國電影華表獎優秀女演員獎，2011 年憑藉電視劇《金達萊》獲得第三屆新農村電視藝術節最佳女主角獎，2016 年憑藉電影《遙遠的約定》獲得 47 屆美國納什維爾國際電影節最佳女主角，2021 年 12 月擔任第 32 屆華鼎獎評委。

data.biography: Yayan Ruhian was born in Tasikmalaya (West Java) on October 19, 1968. He found his passion in Pencak Silat and other martial arts, becoming a professional martial arts instructor. Ruhian is also known as an instructor of an inner breathing technique designed to condition of the body to withstand any impact. In 1988, he began teaching at Perguruan Silat Tenaga Dasar Indonesia (Inner Breathing Technique Silat School in Indonesia). During his term as an instructor he traveled regularly to teach in different cities and abroad.
data.name: Yayan Ruhian

data.biography: 1968年10月19日出生于西爪哇省。他在 Pencak Silat 和其他武术中找到了自己的热情，成为一名专业的武术教练。Ruhian 也被称为内在呼吸技术的教练，旨在调节身体以承受任何冲击。1988年，他开始在Perguruan Silat Tenaga Dasar Indonesia（印度尼西亚的内在呼吸技术Silat学校）任教。在他担任讲师期间，他定期前往不同的城市和国外任教。

范帅琦，1998年5月20日出生于天津市，中国内地影视女演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系。

2019年7月，范帅琦主演的青春微电影《一辈子活在夏天》播映，她也由此正式进入演艺圈。同年12月，《没问题》 。2020年8月，范帅琦主演的迷你悬疑短剧《女孩们在那年夏天》开播 。2021年1月，其参演的国家广电总局重点电视剧《山海情》开播 。2021年5月11日，主演的都市偶像剧《完美的他》播出 。2022年1月，其主演的时间循环短剧《开端》、悬疑冒险剧《淘金》 、古装轻喜剧《卿卿日常》相继播出，而她也因此崭露头角 。2024年1月，范帅琦主演的都市轻喜爱情剧《你也有今天》开播；12月28日，参演的电视剧《大奉打更人》播出。2025年，参演电视剧《真心英雄》； 4月12日，主演的聊斋单元古装剧《无忧渡》播出。
data.name: 范帅琦

data.biography:
Formally trained in theatre and with 18 years of experience in front of the the camera, the award winning actress began her career in local film, theatre and television productions. Notably in feature films such as “Cayo" (2006) by Vicente Juarbe, “Che” (2008) by Steven Soderbergh, and particularly in “The Vessel” (2016) by Julio Quintana with an executive production of Terrence Malick and co-starring with Martin Sheen which showcased her bilingual abilities by shooting simultaneously all scenes in Spanish and English.  She recently co-starred along Pedro Capo in “Sol de Medianoche” by Douglas Sánchez (HBO).  Is the omnipresent narrating voice of Tribeca Film Festival three times winner "Una Noche” (2012) by Lucy Mulloy, the lead role in Cannes Short Film Corner selection “Endless Cycle” (2015) by Fernando Rodríguez which she garnered the “Best Actress” award at the 2016 International Oporto Film Festival. Likewise she was the lead role in the the Long Format Latin Grammy winner “Loco de amor: La historia” (2015) by Kacho López.

She runs and operates her clothing line Skin Onion.
data.name: Aris Mejias

data.biography: Barry Hanley is an aspiring stuntman/actor from Tuam, Co. Galway, Ireland. Hanley was a huge fan of 'The Fall Guy' with Lee Majors as a young lad in Ireland. He comes from a boxing, kickboxing and rugby background. If someone told him that he'd be hitting the dirt on the screen for a living in reality like Colt Seavers on his beloved 'Fall Guy' he'd have questioned their sanity. Hanley feels enormously privileged to have had the opportunity to work for and with some real legends from the thespian sphere and the daredevil world of stunts.
data.name: Barry Hanley

data.biography: Alyssa Diaz was born on September 7, 1985, in the city of Northridge  (California), in the United States. Colombian and Mexican -  American descent, Alyssa studied at Bishop Alemany High School. She began acting at the beginning of the new millennium, participating in some episodes of various series such as "CSI: Miami" and "The Brothers Garcia",  "American Family". In 2005, she won the role of Celia Ortega on the popular soap opera "As the World Turns", in which she played for over 56 episodes.  She later had some recurring roles, such as the Mercedes Moretta on the television series "Southland" and was a guest artist at shows,  which include "The Unit", "Greek", "CSI: New York", "Three Rivers", "Lie to me" or "law & order: Los Angeles (Law & Order: Los  Angeles)". Alyssa is currently working on "The Nine Lives of Chloe King"  series which is broadcast by the ABC Family sign, and which plays the role of Jasmine, cousin of the protagonist Chloe King (Skyler Samuels),  who discovers that she belongs to an ancient race call the Mai, and has powers similar to the of a feline, including their nine lives. Alyssa,  that also filmed some short films and telefilms, participated in her first feature film in 2005, integrating the cast of the comedy "How the  Garcia Girls Spent Their Summer" starring America Ferrera. More recently filmed the horror 'Shark Night 3D' movie (2011) which co-starred along with Sara Paxton and Dustin Milligan. Her latest work for this medium was in the action movie "Red Dawn", whose filming was completed recently and which has the lead of Chris Hemsworth,  Isabel Lucas, and Josh Hutcherson.
data.name: Alyssa Diaz

data.biography: Alyssa Elaine Diaz ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin. Seit 2012 ist sie als Gloria Cruz in der Lifetime-Serie Army Wives zu sehen.  Ihre erste große Rolle war die der Celia Ortega in der Seifenoper Jung und Leidenschaftlich – Wie das Leben so spielt des Senders CBS, welche sie vom 9. Februar bis zum 10. August 2005 verkörperte. Nach weiteren Gastauftritten in Serie wie The Unit – Eine Frage der Ehre, CSI: NY, Southland und Lie to Me folgte 2011 die Rolle der Jasmine in The Nine Lives of Chloe King sowie ein Auftritt in Law & Order: LA. 2012 war Diaz sowohl in einer Folge von Dr. Dani Santino – Spiel des Lebens und Revolution als auch im Film Red Dawn zu sehen. Darüber hinaus war sie in vier Folgen von Vampire Diaries zu Gast. Zwischen 2012 und 2013 war sie in einer Hauptrolle in Army Wives zu sehen. Außerdem ist sie seit der 2. Staffel in der Serie Zoo in einer Hauptrolle zu sehen. Seit 2018 verkörpert sie in der Fernsehserie The Rookie die Polizistin Angela Lopez.

Alyssa Elaine Diaz es una actriz estadounidense (7 de septiembre de 1985).

Es conocida por haber interpretado a Celia Ortega en As The World Turns, a Jasmine en The Nine Lives of Chloe King y a Gloria Cruz en Army Wives.

Alyssa Diaz is geboren op 7 september 1985 in de stad Northridge (Californië), in de Verenigde Staten. Colombiaanse afkomst en m xico - Amerikaan, Alyssa studeerde aan de Bishop Alemany High School. Zij begon met acteren aan het begin van het nieuwe millennium en nam deel aan enkele afleveringen van verschillende series zoals "CSI: Miami" en "The Brothers Garcia", "American Family". In 2005 won zij de rol van Celia Ortega in de populaire soap "As the World Turns", die meer dan 56 afleveringen speelde. Later had zij een aantal terugkerende rollen, zoals de Mercedes Moretta in de televisieserie "Southland" en was een gastartiest bij otris-shows, waaronder "The Unit", "Greek", "CSI: New York", "Three Rivers" , "Lie to me" of "law & order: Los Angeles (Law & Order: Los Angeles)". Alyssa werkt momenteel aan de serie "The Nine Lives of Chloe King" die wordt uitgezonden door het ABC Family-bord, en die de rol speelt van Jasmine, de neef van de hoofdpersoon Chloe King (Skyler Samuels), die ontdekt dat hij toebehoort aan een oude ras noemen de Mai, en heeft krachten die vergelijkbaar zijn met die van een kat, inclusief hun negen levens. Alyssa, die ook enkele korte films en televisiefilms heeft gefilmd, nam in 2005 deel aan haar eerste speelfilm, waarbij zij de cast van de komedie "How the Garcia Girls Spent Their Summer" met America Ferrera in de hoofdrol integreerde. Meer recentelijk werd de horrorfilm 'Shark Night 3D' (2011) gefilmd die samen met Sara Paxton en Dustin Milligan speelde. Haar laatste werk voor dit medium was in de actiefilm "Red Dawn", waarvan de opnames onlangs zijn afgerond en met de hoofdrol van Chris Hemsworth, Isabel Lucas en Josh Hutcherson.

于 1985 年 9 月 7 日出生于美国北岭市（加利福尼亚州）。Alyssa是哥伦比亚和墨西哥裔美国人，曾就读于Bishop Alemany高中。她在新千年伊始开始演戏，参演了《犯罪现场调查：迈阿密》和《加西亚兄弟》、《美国家庭》等各种剧集。2005 年，她在流行的肥皂剧《世界转动时》中赢得了西莉亚·奥尔特加 （Celia Ortega） 的角色，她在剧中扮演了超过 56 集。后来，她扮演了一些反复出现的角色，例如电视连续剧“Southland”中的梅赛德斯·莫雷塔（Mercedes Moretta），并且是节目的客座艺术家，其中包括“The Unit”，“Greek”，“CSI：New York”，“Three Rivers”，“Lie to me”或“law & order： Los Angeles （Law & Order： Los Angeles）”。Alyssa目前正在制作由ABC家庭标志播出的“克洛伊·金的九条命”系列，该剧扮演主角克洛伊·金（斯凯勒·塞缪尔斯饰）的表妹茉莉花，她发现自己属于一个叫做Mai的古老种族，并拥有类似于猫科动物的力量， 包括他们的九条命。Alyssa也拍摄了一些短片和电视电影，她于2005年参加了她的第一部故事片，整合了由美国费雷拉主演的喜剧《加西亚女孩如何度过夏天》的演员阵容。最近拍摄了恐怖电影“鲨鱼之夜 3D”（2011 年），与萨拉·帕克斯顿和达斯汀·米利根共同主演。她最近为这种媒介拍摄的动作片《红色黎明》是最近完成的，由克里斯·海姆斯沃斯、伊莎贝尔·卢卡斯和乔什·哈切森领衔主演。
data.name: 艾丽莎·迪亚兹

方中信（英語：Alex Fong，1963年3月17日－），原名符力[1]，香港演員。活躍於電影界和電視界。憑在電影《旺角黑夜》中的出色表演獲第5屆華語電影傳媒大獎影帝，並提名香港電影金像獎最佳男主角。方中信畢業於澳門名校粵華中學。其妻子為1993年港姐冠軍莫可欣，育有一女，女兒2008年6月9日在香港養和醫院出生[2]，名為符迦晴，寓意長大後會找到好人家。藝名來自所拍的電影《朝花夕拾》，此電影的男主角名字就是方中信。由於其俊朗的外表酷似李察基爾，故有「香港李察基爾」之稱。

方中信完成《仁心解碼II》一劇後，合約正式約滿，與無綫再無合約關係，現為英皇電影旗下藝人。

方中信除擔任演藝工作外，他還是賽車手。方中信最近參與2014年在珠海國際賽車場舉辦的克里歐杯中國系列賽，在比賽中獲得第三名。[3]

方中信在2015年底回巢無綫電視，其後與廖啟智拍攝劇集《律政強人》。

data.name: Alex Fong Chung-Sun

Bill Istvan Günther Skarsgård (Swedish: [ˈbɪlːˈskɑ̌ːʂɡoːɖ]; born 9 August 1990) is a Swedish actor. He is known for portraying Pennywise in the horror films It (2017) and It Chapter Two (2019), along with the 2025 prequel series It: Welcome to Derry. Other horror appearances were in the series Hemlock Grove (2013–2015) and Castle Rock (2018–2019) and the films Barbarian (2022) and Nosferatu (2024).

Skarsgård has also appeared in the comedy Simple Simon (2010), the drama Nine Days (2020), and the action films The Divergent Series: Allegiant (2016), Atomic Blonde (2017), and John Wick: Chapter 4 (2023).

data.biography:
Білл Скашґорд — шведський актор, найбільш відомий за роллю Романа Ґодфрі в телесеріалі «Гемлокова штольня», а також клоуна Пеннівайза в екранізації роману Стівена Кінга «Воно». Інші відомі фільми з його участю – «Просто Саймон» (2010), «Анна Кареніна» (2012), «Дивергент 3: віддана» (2016) й «Атомна блондинка» (2017).

Народився в родині відомого актора Стеллана Скашґорда та його першої дружини Мю. Його брати, Александер і Ґустаф Скашґорди, також актори.

Дитинство Білла минуло в постійних розʼїздах. Батько багато знімався та брав синів із собою. У 12 років хлопчик провів три місяці в Камбоджі, потім жив у Мексиці. Різноманіття культур і різних життєвих ситуацій, осягнених під час подорожей, навчило Білла цінувати суспільство та природу, бути організованішим і акуратнішим.

У 2011 році був номінований на шведську премію «Золотий жук» за роль Саймона в стрічці «Просто Саймон».
data.name: Білл Скашґорд

data.biography:
Bill Istvan Günther Skarsgård svéd színész, 1990. augusztus 9-én született Vällingby-ben. Édesapja Stellan Skarsgård, édesanyja My Skarsgård. Hét testvére van: Alexander, Gustaf, Sam, Valter (akik színészek), Ossian, Kolbjörn és Eija. Ossian és Kolbjörn csak féltestvérei, az ő édesanyjuk Megan Everett.

Karrierjét 2000-ben kezdte egy svéd thrillerben, a „White Water Fury”-ban, majd a Laura Trentner svéd írónőről készült minisorozatban egy epizódjában tűnt fel. Ezt követően számos svéd filmben szerepelt, mielőtt megjelent volna a nemzetközi filmiparban, játszott többek közt az „Arn – The Kingdom at Road’s End” és a „Kenny Begins” c. produkciókban, majd 2011-ben Guldbagge-díjra jelölték a „Simple Simon”-ban nyújtott alakításáért. A szóban forgó filmben Simon szerepében csillogtatta meg tehetségét.

2012-ben szerepelt először külföldi filmben, a brit gyártású „Anna Kareninában”, majd 2013-tól a „Hemlock Grove” c. Netflix sorozat egyik főszereplőjét, Roman Godfrey-t játszotta három évadon át. 2014 áprilisában Skarsgård volt a „Hero” férfi divat és kulturális magazin főcímlapján, és egy interjú is készült vele. Skarsgård játszotta Matthew-t, a science-fiction thriller, „A beavatott” sorozat „A hűséges” című részében 2016-ban, ami élete első nagyobb amerikai filmszerepe volt.

Bill Istvan Günther Skarsgård (* 9. August 1990 in Stockholm) ist ein schwedischer Schauspieler. Er gehört zur bekannten schwedischen Schauspielerfamilie Skarsgård.

2011 wurde er für seine Rolle des autistischen Simon im schwedischen Komödien-Drama "Im Weltraum gibt es keine Gefühle" für den schwedischen Filmpreis Guldbagge als Bester Hauptdarsteller und bei den Young Artist Awards 2011 in der Kategorie Beste Darstellung in einem internationalen Spielfilm nominiert. Im März 2012 bekam er eine Hauptrolle in Eli Roths Thriller-Serie "Hemlock Grove".

Der Schauspieler spielt außerdem die Hauptfigur Pennywise in der Neuverfilmung von Stephen Kings Roman "Es".

Quelle: Wikipedia

Bill Skarsgård est un acteur suédois, né le 9 août 1990 à Stockholm dans le quartier de Vällingby.

Il est notamment connu pour son rôle dans Simple Simon et pour son interprétation du clown Grippe-Sou / Pennywise dans les adaptations cinématographiques (Ça et Ça : Chapitre 2) du roman de Stephen King.

ممثل سويدي، ولد في 9 اغسطس 1990 بمدينة فالينجباي بالسويد، في عام 2011 رشح لجائزة الخنفساء الذهبية لبطولته في (Simon in Simple Simon)

وفي عام 2014 ظهر على غلاف مجلة الموضة والثقافة وهي مجلة نصف سنوية، عُرف عنه مشاركته في سلسلة أفلام الخيال العلمي (The Divergent Series: Allegiant) عام 2016 وهو أول فيلم أمريكي يشارك فيه.
data.name: بيل سكارسغارد

Bill Istvan Günther Skarsgård (tiếng Thụy Điển: [ˈbɪlːˈskɑ̌ːʂɡoːɖ]; sinh ngày 9 tháng 8 năm 1990) là một diễn viên người Thụy Điển. Anh được biết đến với vai Pennywise trong các bộ phim kinh dị It (2017) và It Chapter Two (2019), cùng với loạt phim tiền truyện It: Welcome to Derry (2025). Các vai diễn kinh dị khác của anh là trong loạt phim Hemlock Grove (2013–2015) và Castle Rock (2018–2019) và các bộ phim Barbarian (2022) và Nosferatu (2024).

Skarsgård cũng đã xuất hiện trong phim hài Simple Simon (2010), phim chính kịch Nine Days (2020), và các bộ phim hành động The Divergent Series: Allegiant (2016), Atomic Blonde (2017), và John Wick: Chapter 4 (2023).

data.biography:
Bill Istvan Günther Skarsgård, 9 Ağustos 1990 tarihinde Vällingby, İsveç'te dünyaya gelmiştir. Sinema dünyasının en tanınmış ailelerinden birine mensup olan Skarsgård, efsanevi aktör Stellan Skarsgård'ın oğlu ve yine kendisi gibi oyuncu olan Alexander ve Gustaf Skarsgård'ın kardeşidir. Böyle bir ailede büyümesi, onun erken yaşta oyunculukla tanışmasını sağladı ve kariyerine İsveç'te çocuk oyuncu olarak başladı.

İsveç'teki ilk büyük çıkışını, 2010 yapımı "Simple Simon" (I rymden finns inga känslor) filminde canlandırdığı Asperger sendromlu Simon karakteriyle yaptı. Bu filmdeki dokunaklı performansı ona büyük övgü kazandırdı ve filmin İsveç'in Yabancı Dilde En İyi Film Akademi Ödülü adayı olarak seçilmesinde önemli rol oynadı. Bu başarının ardından uluslararası projelere yönelen Skarsgård, Hollywood'daki ilk önemli adımıni, 2013-2015 yılları arasında yayınlanan Netflix dizisi "Hemlock Grove"da canlandırdığı gizemli ve karanlık Roman Godfrey karakteriyle attı. Bu rol, onun karmaşık ve rahatsız edici karakterleri canlandırma yeteneğini uluslararası izleyiciye kanıtladı.

Ancak Bill Skarsgård'ı dünya çapında bir yıldıza dönüştüren ve adını sinema tarihine yazdıran rol, Stephen King'in klasik romanından uyarlanan "O" (It) (2017) filminde canlandırdığı şeytani palyaço Pennywise oldu. Fiziksel dönüşümü, rahatsız edici gülüşü, özgün ses tonu ve karakterin her anını dolduran tehditkar enerjisiyle yarattığı Pennywise, modern korku sinemasının en ikonik kötü karakterlerinden biri haline geldi. Bu muazzam başarısını, 2019 yapımı devam filmi "O: Bölüm 2" (It Chapter Two) ile pekiştirdi.

Pennywise'ın ardından Skarsgård, karanlık ve stilize rollerdeki başarısını sürdürdü. "John Wick: Bölüm 4" (John Wick: Chapter 4) (2023) filminde canlandırdığı elegant ve acımasız ana kötü karakter Marquis de Gramont ile aksiyon türündeki yeteneğini de gösterdi. 2024 yılı ise onun için bir başka zirve noktası oldu; kült klasik "The Crow"un yeniden çevriminde başrol Eric Draven'ı ve usta yönetmen Robert Eggers'in gotik korku filmi "Nosferatu"da başroldeki vampir Kont Orlok'u canlandırarak, kendisini fiziksel olarak dönüştürdüğü zorlu rolleri üstlenme konusundaki cesaretini bir kez daha kanıtladı. Bill Skarsgård, kendine has karizması ve korkusuz rol seçimleriyle kuşağının en heyecan verici ve yetenekli aktörlerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

全名： 標·伊什特萬·君特·史加斯葛。

出生於瑞典斯德哥爾摩。

生日 1990 年 8 月 9 日，星期四。

身高： 191 cm（2010 年），是史加斯葛家族的第四位演員。

他的父親斯特蘭、大哥 Alexander、二哥 Gustaf 都是演員。現在他的六弟也成為了一名演員。

他為人所熟知的電影是《簡單的西蒙》，飾演了一名艾斯伯格綜合症患者，本片代表瑞典參加 2011 年奧斯卡最佳外語片的角逐。

主要作品有： 《藍色天空下/天空是藍色的》 《簡單的西蒙》 《西蒙和橡樹。《西蒙和橡樹》是 2011 年瑞典倍受好評的電影。

《王冠/王冠上的明珠/皇冠》。《王冠》本來打算拍攝為 3D 影片，但因為種種原因而夭折。

Ke Huy Quan (/ˌkiː.hwiː.ˈkwɑːn/ KEE-hwee-KWAHN; Vietnamese: Quan Kế Huy; born August 20, 1971), also known as Jonathan Ke Quan, is an American actor. His accolades include a Golden Globe Award and an Academy Award.

Born in Vietnam, Quan immigrated to the United States as a child. As a child actor, he rose to fame playing Short Round in Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (1984) and Data in The Goonies (1985). Following a few roles as a young adult in the 1990s, he took a 19-year acting hiatus, during which he worked as a stunt choreographer and assistant director.

Quan returned to acting with the family adventure film Finding ʻOhana (2021), followed by the critically acclaimed Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022), a performance that won him various accolades, including the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor. He is the first Vietnam-born actor to win an Academy Award. Time magazine named him one of the 100 most influential people in the world in 2023. He has since starred in the second season of the Disney+ series Loki in 2023 and in the Disney animated film Zootopia 2 in 2025.

data.biography:
Ke Huy Quan, né le 20 août 1971 à Saigon au Sud-Vietnam, est un acteur américain d'origine vietnamienne chinoise. Réfugié aux États-Unis avec sa famille en 1979, il débute enfant au cinéma avec *Indiana Jones et le Temple maudit* (1984) de Steven Spielberg, dans le rôle iconique de Demi-Lune (Short Round), suivi de *Les Goonies* (1985) en Data.

Après des rôles dans les années 1990, il met sa carrière d'acteur en pause près de vingt ans, travaillant comme chorégraphe de cascades et assistant réalisateur, faute d'opportunités pour les acteurs asiatiques.

Son retour triomphal arrive avec *Everything Everywhere All at Once* (2022) des Daniels, où il incarne Waymond Wang, performance acclamée qui lui vaut l'Oscar du meilleur acteur dans un second rôle en 2023 – premier acteur né au Vietnam à remporter cette récompense –, un Golden Globe, un SAG Award et de nombreuses distinctions.

Il enchaîne avec *American Born Chinese* (2023), la saison 2 de *Loki* (2023) dans le rôle d'O.B., la voix de Han dans *Kung Fu Panda 4* (2024), et en 2025 avec *Love Hurts* (rôle principal), *The Electric State* et la voix dans *Zootopia 2*.

Marié à Echo Quan, il réside à Los Angeles.

Ke Huy Quan (* 20. August 1971 in Saigon, Vietnam), auch bekannt als Jonathan Ke Quan, ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Stunt-Choreograf. Mitte der 1980er-Jahre wurde er als Kinderdarsteller im Hollywood-Kino durch die Filme Indiana Jones und der Tempel des Todes und Die Goonies bekannt. Im Jahr 2022 gelang ihm mit Everything Everywhere All at Once ein erfolgreiches Comeback im Erwachsenenfach, für das er u. a. mit dem Oscar als Bester Nebendarsteller ausgezeichnet wurde.

💥Ке Хюи Куан, также известный как Джонатан Ке Кван. Родился в Сайгоне, Южный Вьетнам. Был 1-ым из 9-и детей. Отец работал инженером, а мать была домохозяйкой. В 1978-ом семья бежала из Вьетнама и несколько месяцев жила в лагере для беженцев в Гонконге, прежде чем переехать в США. Учился в Калифорнийском университете в Лос-Анджелесе на факультете киноискусства. Работает актёром, каскадёром и помощником режиссёра. С 2006-го женат на Эхо Куан, детей у пары нет.

🏆Главные награды🏆: Оскар (2023) [Всё везде и сразу], Золотой глобус (2023) [Всё везде и сразу], Гильдия киноактёров (2023) [Всё везде и сразу].

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Индиана Джонс и Храм судьбы» (1984), «Балбесы» (1985), «Всё везде и сразу» (2022), «Локи» (2023), «Любовь - боль» (2025).

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Куан прославился ребёнком в «Индиане Джонсе» и «Балбесах», но затем долго не мог найти ролей и ушёл за кулисы, работая каскадёром и постановщиком боевых сцен. После 20-летнего перерыва он триумфально вернулся с ролью в фильме «Всё везде и сразу» и стал первым вьетнамским актёром, получившим «Оскар».
data.name: Ке Хюи Куан

data.biography:
Ke Huy Quan (ur. 20 sierpnia 1971), znany również jako Jonathan Ke Quan, jest wietnamsko-amerykańskim aktorem pochodzenia chińskiego. Jako młody aktor Quan zyskał sławę grając Short Round w Indiana Jones i Świątynia Zagłady (1984) i Data w Goonies (1985).

Po kilku rolach w latach 90. Quan zrobił sobie prawie 20-letnią przerwę w aktorstwie, podczas której pracował jako choreograf kaskaderski i asystent reżysera. Wrócił do aktorstwa w filmie science fiction Wszystko wszędzie naraz (2022). Jego występ został szeroko pochwalony i przyniósł mu wiele wyróżnień, w tym Oscara, Critics Choice, Złoty Glob, Independent Spirit i SAG Award.

Ke Huy Quan (veya Jonathan Ke Quan), 20 Ağustos 1971 tarihinde Saygon, Güney Vietnam'da (günümüzdeki Ho Chi Minh Kenti) dünyaya gelmiştir. Vietnam Savaşı'nın ardından ailesiyle birlikte ülkesini terk etmek zorunda kalmış ve bir süre Hong Kong'da bir mülteci kampında yaşadıktan sonra 1979'da mülteci yerleştirme programıyla ABD'ye yerleşmiştir.

Oyunculuk kariyeri tamamen tesadüf eseri başlamıştır. 1983 yılında, "Indiana Jones ve Kıyamet Tapınağı" (Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom) (1984) filminin seçmelerine kardeşine destek olmak için giden Quan, yönetmen Steven Spielberg'in dikkatini çekmiş ve filmin en sevilen karakterlerinden biri olan Short Round (Kısa Tur) rolü için seçilmiştir. Harrison Ford'un canlandırdığı Indiana Jones'un sadık, esprili ve becerikli yardımcısı rolüyle bir gecede dünya çapında tanınan bir çocuk yıldız haline geldi. Bu büyük başarının ardından, bir başka 80'ler klasiği olan "Goonies" (Define Avcıları) (1985) filminde, teknoloji meraklısı ve mucit Data karakterini canlandırarak jenerasyonunun en sevilen genç aktörlerinden biri oldu.

Ancak 1990'lara gelindiğinde, Hollywood'da Asya kökenli aktörler için rollerin son derece sınırlı olması nedeniyle oyunculuk kariyerinde zorluklar yaşadı. Gelen tekliflerden memnun kalmayınca, tutkusu olan sinemadan kopmamak için kamerasının arkasına geçmeye karar verdi. Güney Kaliforniya Üniversitesi Sinema Sanatları Okulu'ndan mezun oldu ve yıllarca "X-Men" (2000) gibi büyük yapımlarda dövüş koreografı ve yönetmen yardımcısı olarak çalıştı.

Yıllar sonra, "Crazy Rich Asians" filminin başarısından ilham alarak oyunculuğa geri dönmeye karar verdi ve bu karar, sinema tarihinin en ilham verici geri dönüş hikayelerinden birini başlattı. 2022 yapımı "Her Şey Her Yerde Aynı Anda" (Everything Everywhere All at Once) filminde canlandırdığı Waymond Wang karakteriyle sinemaya muhteşem bir dönüş yaptı. Farklı evrenlerdeki karakterin hem naif, hem komik hem de aksiyon dolu versiyonlarını büyük bir ustalıkla canlandıran Quan, bu performansıyla En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Altın Küre ve Akademi Ödülü'nü (Oscar) kazandı.

Oscar zaferinin ardından Marvel Sinema Evreni'ne katılarak "Loki" dizisinin ikinci sezonunda önemli bir rol üstlendi. Ke Huy Quan'ın hikayesi, bir mülteci kampından Hollywood'un zirvesine uzanan, azim, yetenek ve hayallerden asla vazgeçmemenin en dokunaklı örneklerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

data.biography: Brendan James Penny (born November 9, 1978) is a Canadian film and television actor who first became well known to TV audiences as A.J. Varland in the first season of Whistler that aired in Canada from 2006–2008. He is perhaps best known as Detective Brian Lucas in Motive, a Canadian crime drama centred on a team of Vancouver homicide detectives, also starring Kristin Lehman, Louis Ferreira and Lauren Holly, which aired from 2013–2016. Brendan currently stars as Kevin O'Brien in the Hallmark Channel family drama series Chesapeake Shores, which premiered on August 14, 2016. data.biography: Fred Gwynne (July 10, 1926–July 2, 1993) was an American actor. He was best known for his roles in the 1960s sitcoms “Car 54, Where Are You?” and “The Munsters,” as well as his later roles in the films “The Cotton Club,” “Pet Sematary,” and “My Cousin Vinny.” He passed away from pancreatic cancer at age 66 in 1993.
data.name: Fred Gwynne

data.biography:
Fred Gwynne (eigentlich Frederick Hubbard Gwynne; * 10. Juli 1926 in New York City; † 2. Juli 1993 in Taneytown, Maryland) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Kinderbuchautor.

Die bekannteste Rolle des 1,96 Meter großen Fred Gwynne war sicher die des Herman Munster in der Fernsehserie The Munsters. Nachdem The Munsters abgesetzt wurden, bekam Gwynnes Karriere einen Knick, da viele Besetzungschefs ihn auf das Rollenmuster ‘Herman Munster’ festgelegt sahen. Zwischenzeitlich schrieb und illustrierte er Kinderbücher, die Simon & Schuster mit großem Erfolg herausgebracht haben, und betätigte sich als Bühnenschauspieler.

Dennoch trat er in seiner fast 40-jährigen Kino-Karriere in Klassikern auf wie Die Faust im Nacken, Cotton Club, Eine verhängnisvolle Affäre (mit Michael Douglas und Glenn Close), Wolfsmilch oder Woody Allens Kafka-Hommage Schatten und Nebel sowie 1990 in Mord in schwarz/weiß (mit Richard Crenna und Kenneth Welsh). In der britischen Komödie Wasser trat er als Ölmagnat auf. Seine wohl bekannteste Kinorolle hatte er in Friedhof der Kuscheltiere nach dem Roman von Stephen King.

data.biography: Коваленко Виталий Владимирович - родился в Павлодаре, Казахская ССР, СССР. Будучи школьником, занимался в детской театральной студии «Дебют». В 1996 году окончил Екатеринбургский государственный театральный институт (курс М.С. Ершовой). Работал в Екатеринбургском театре драмы (сезон 1996-1997). В 1997-2002 годах был ведущим артистом Новосибирского драматического театра "Красный факел", в котором сыграл более двадцати разноплановых ролей. С 2002 года - в труппе Александринского театра. Michael Fitzgerald Wong aka Wong Man-Tak (Chinese: 王敏德, born in Troy, New York, 16 April 1965) is a Chinese-American and a Hong Kong based actor, director, singer and producer.

His most notable film is the 1998 film Beast Cops which won a Hong Kong Film Award with Wong in the lead role. As of 2024, he has appeared in over a hundred films in twenty-one years, often as wealthy characters.

Kim Mi Kyung is a South Korean actress. She made her theater debut in 1985. A year later, she made her film debut and her television drama debut soon followed. One of the most recognized actresses in Korean television, she has garnered fans the world over. You can find her making appearances in numerous films and television dramas including, "The Master's Sun" (2013), “Healer” (2014), “Another Oh Hae Young” (2016), and “Her Private Life” (2019).

Kim married Park Geun Won in 1994 and they have a daughter named Park Soy.

data.biography:
Kim Mi-Kyung é uma atriz sul-coreana da Popeye Entertainment. Ela fez sua estreia no teatro em 1985. Kim é membro da companhia de teatro Yeonwoo Mudae desde 1985. Ela é mais ativa como atriz coadjuvante em dramas de televisão.

Um ano depois, ela estreou no cinema e logo em seguida sua estreia no drama televisivo. Uma das atrizes mais reconhecidas da televisão coreana, conquistou fãs em todo o mundo. Você pode encontrá-la fazendo aparições em vários filmes e dramas de televisão, incluindo “The Master’s Sun” (2013), “Healer” (2014), “Another Oh Hae Young” (2016) e “Her Private Life” (2019).

Kim se casou com Park Geun-Won em 1994 e eles têm uma filha chamada Park Soy.

data.biography:
Edie McClurg (born July 23, 1951) is an American actress, voice actress, stand-up comedian, and opera singer. She has performed in nearly 90 films and 55 television episodes, often portraying characters with a cheery Midwestern accent.

McClurg was born and raised in Kansas City, Missouri on July 23, 1951, to Mac, a mailman, and Irene McClurg, an FAA secretary. She has an older brother, Bob, who is also an actor. McClurg attended the University of Missouri–Kansas City in the mid-1960s, where she also taught radio for eight years. She earned a master's degree from Syracuse University.

McClurg's onscreen debut was in the 1976 Brian De Palma horror film "Carrie" as Helen Shyres, one of Carrie's classmates. The following year, she was a member of the cast of "The Richard Pryor Show". In 1980, she was a regular performer on "The David Letterman Show" in the persona of Mrs. Marv Mendenhall. She also had a role in "Elvira, Mistress of the Dark", in which she plays the Town Council President Chastity Pariah. She also had a minor role in "Cheech & Chong's Next Movie".

Having been a member of San Francisco's improv comedy the Pitcshel Players, she moved to Los Angeles and joined the Groundlings troupe.

She worked with fellow Groundling player [[Paul Reubens]] on his first play "The Pee-wee Herman Show", in which she appeared in 1981 as "Hermit Hattie". McClurg has appeared in almost 90 films and 55 television episodes, usually typecast as a middle-aged, somewhat stubborn, and dim-witted Midwesterner.

McClurg is known for a number of roles, including Mrs. Burns in "A River Runs Through It", Grace in "Ferris Bueller's Day Off", Lucille Tarlek on "WKRP in Cincinnati", Lynn in "She's Having a Baby", Willamae Jones in the television remake of "Harper Valley PTA", Mrs. Patty Poole on "The Hogan Family" (originally "Valerie"), Bonnie Brindle on "Small Wonder", Marge Sweetwater in "Back to School", the car rental agent in "Planes, Trains and Automobiles", Mrs. Violet Bleakman on "Clifford the Big Red Dog", and Mrs. Beeker on "7th Heaven".

She guest starred as Barri's mother in an episode of "Campus Ladies". She portrayed one of the wicked stepsisters in the Faerie Tale Theatre production "Cinderella." McClurg appeared on several game shows, including "Match Game", "The $25,000 Pyramid", "Password Plus", and "Super Password".

McClurg contributed assorted voices for "The Jetsons", "The Snorks", "Life with Louie", "A Bug's Life", "Justin & the Knights of Valour", "Cars" and "Cars 2". She voiced Carlotta in "The Little Mermaid", Mary in "Wreck-It Ralph", Molly in "Home on the Range", Miss Right in "The Secret of NIMH", the Dragon in the "Nightmare Ned" video game, Barsa in "Kiki's Delivery Service", Fran on "Higglytown Heroes", Mrs. Claus in "Holidaze: The Christmas That Almost Didn't Happen", Grandma Taters in "The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius", Violet Stimpleton in "Rocket Power", Bea's mother in "Fish Hooks", Winnie Pig in "Tiny Toon Adventures: How I Spent My Vacation", Aunt Ruth in "Bobby's World" and Trudi Traveler in an episode of "Wander Over Yonder". Continuing her passion for performing improvised comedy, McClurg is a player with Spolin Players.
data.name: Edie McClurg

Jamey Sheridan (born July 12, 1951) is an American actor.

He has had a prolific acting career in theater, television, and feature film productions. He earned a Tony nomination in 1987 for his performance in the revival of Arthur Miller's All My Sons. After several TV movie appearances, Sheridan landed a starring role on Shannon's Deal. His later television roles include Chicago Hope, Law & Order: Criminal Intent, and Stephen King's The Stand. Other roles include films Wild America and Video Voyeur: The Susan Wilson Story.

杰米·谢里丹（Jamey Sheridan，1951年7月12日-），美国演员。

data.biography: Choi Jin Hyuk is one of the most popular South Korean actors working today. Born as Kim Tae Ho on February 9, 1986, Choi Jin Hyuk broke into entertainment in 2006 after he won the grand prize in the reality talent show “Survival Star Audition.” He adopted his stage name in 2010 before his role in the drama “It’s Alright, Daddy’s Daughter.” He also starred in “I Need Romance” (2011) and “Panda and Hedgehog” (2012), but it was his memorable roles of a fierce spirit god in the drama “Gu Family Book” and a moody chaebol in “Heirs” in 2013 that elevated Choi Jin Hyuk to superstardom. Leading roles quickly followed starting in 2014 with the popular dramas “Emergency Couple,” “Grandpas Over Flowers Investigation Unit,” “Fated to Love You” and “Pride and Prejudice.” In March 2015, Choi Jin Hyuk enlisted for his mandatory military service, and he made his comeback after discharge in the 2017 drama “Tunnel.”
data.name: Choi Jin-hyuk

data.biography:
崔振赫（韩语：최진혁，1986年2月9日－）[1]，韩国男演员，身高187公分，本名金太昊（朝鲜语：김태호／金太昊）[2]，自2010年演出电视剧《没关系，爸爸的女儿》起才使用艺名崔振赫（又译崔真赫或崔镇赫）。

崔振赫出生于韩国全罗南道木浦市，在2006年于KBS《明星发掘大赛》夺得冠军，开始其演艺生涯。虽然他其后出演了多部电视剧，但未能在观众心中留下深刻印象。2010年，崔振赫与文彩元主演了无线台SBS的9点月火剧《没关系，爸爸的女儿》，虽首次担任男主角，但因收视不高而未引起注意。2011年，崔振赫出演了有线台tvN的人气电视剧《需要浪漫》而崭露头角。2011年11月，崔振赫再度主演SBS电视剧《我的女儿是花儿》，虽然获得高收视，但崔振赫依旧未能引起过多的关注。2013年4月，于《九家之书》中饰演九越灵，获得了高涨的人气，更出现了“越灵病”一词；他同时也参与了《九家之书》原声带的录制。2013年10月，崔振赫出演了《欲戴王冠，必承其重－继承者们》（饰演金元），展现成熟的魅力。2014年1月，主演《急诊男女》，首次挑战喜剧角色。2014年10月，崔振赫在《傲慢与偏见》中饰演具东致一角。同年12月，崔振赫凭着于《傲慢与偏见》出色的表现夺得MBC演技大赏优秀演技赏。崔振赫于2015年3月31日入伍，原预计于2016年12月30日退伍。 但因膝盖软骨受伤，接受干细胞软骨移植手术，军医诊断称需要长期治疗，很难继续服役，因此已在同年10月16日退伍。

data.biography:
Choi Jin-Hyuk, originalmente conhecido pelo nome artístico de Kim Tae-Ho, é um ator sul-coreano representado pela G-Tree Creative. Ele estreou na série da SBS de 2010, 'It's Okay, Daddy's Girl'. No entanto, seu papel de destaque veio durante a série de 2013 'Gu Family Book'.

Choi se alistou para o serviço militar obrigatório em 31 de março de 2015, mas recebeu alta após apenas sete meses devido a uma lesão no joelho. Ele voltou a atuar na série de viagem no tempo da OCN de 2017, 'Tunnel'.

Em 8 de outubro de 2021, foi anunciado que ele interromperia todas as atividades após ser flagrado violando as normas de prevenção do COVID-19. Como parte de seu hiato, ele deixou o popular programa de variedades da SBS “My Little Old Boy”, como membro regular do programa. O programa também o editou o máximo possível de imagens já filmadas naquela época.

崔振赫（韓語：최진혁，1986 年 2 月 9 日－），韓國男演員，身高 187 公分，本名崔振赫（朝鮮語：김태호／崔振赫），自 2010 年演出電視劇《沒關係，爸爸的女兒》起才使用藝名崔振赫（又譯崔真赫或崔鎮赫）。

崔振赫出生於韓國全羅南道木浦市，在 2006 年於 KBS《明星發掘大賽》奪得冠軍，開始其演藝生涯。雖然他其後出演了多部電視劇，但未能在觀眾心中留下深刻印象。2010 年，崔振赫與文彩元主演了無線台 SBS 的 9 點月火劇《沒關係，爸爸的女兒》，雖首次擔任男主角，但因收視不高而未引起注意。2011 年，崔振赫出演了有線台 tvN 的人氣電視劇《需要浪漫》而嶄露頭角。2011 年 11 月，崔振赫再度主演 SBS 電視劇《我的女兒是花兒》，雖然獲得高收視，但崔振赫依舊未能引起過多的關注。2013 年 4 月，於《九家之書》中飾演九越靈，獲得了高漲的人氣，更出現了“越靈病”一詞；他同時也參與了《九家之書》原聲帶的錄製。2013 年 10 月，崔振赫出演了《欲戴王冠，必承其重－繼承者們》（飾演金元），展現成熟的魅力。2014 年 1 月，主演《急診男女》，首次挑戰喜劇角色。2014 年 10 月，崔振赫在《傲慢與偏見》中飾演具東致一角。同年 12 月，崔振赫憑著於《傲慢與偏見》出色的表現奪得 MBC 演技大賞優秀演技賞。崔振赫於 2015 年 3 月 31 日入伍，原預計於 2016 年 12 月 30 日退伍。

但因膝蓋軟骨受傷，接受幹細胞軟骨移植手術，軍醫診斷稱需要長期治療，很難繼續服役，因此已在同年 10 月 16 日退伍。

國籍 韓國 出生 1986 年 2 月 9 日（35 歲） 韓國全羅南道木浦市 職業 演員 語言 韓語、基本英語 教育程度 大真大學影視學系中退 親屬 父親、母親、爺爺 出道日期 2006 年，​15 年前 代表作品 《九家之書》《繼承者們》《急診男女》《命中註定我愛你》《傲慢與偏見》《血隧》《馬成的喜悦》《皇后的品格》 活躍年代 2006 年至今 經紀公司 G - Tree Creative

data.biography: Mako was born in Kobe, Japan, the son of noted children's book author and illustrator Taro Yashima. His parents moved to the United States when he was a small child. He joined them there after World War II, in 1949, joining the military in the 1950s. He became a naturalized American citizen in 1956. When Mako first joined his parents in the USA, he studied architecture. During his military service, he discovered his theatrical talent, and trained at the Pasadena Community Playhouse. Mako was married to actress Shizuko Hoshi with whom he had two daughters (both are actresses) and three grandchildren.
data.name: Mako

data.biography: Mako nasceu em Kobe, Japão, filho do famoso autor de livros infantis e ilustrador Taro Yashima. Seus pais se mudaram para os Estados Unidos quando ele era criança. Ele se juntou a eles lá após a Segunda Guerra Mundial, em 1949, ingressando no exército na década de 1950. Ele se naturalizou cidadão americano em 1956. Quando Mako foi morar com seus pais nos Estados Unidos, ele estudou arquitetura. Durante o serviço militar, ele descobriu seu talento teatral e treinou no Pasadena Community Playhouse. Mako foi casado com a atriz Shizuko Hoshi, com quem teve duas filhas (ambas são atrizes) e três netos.

Mako se narodil v japonském Kóbe jako syn známého autora dětských knih a ilustrátora Taro Jašimy. Když byl malý, jeho rodiče se přestěhovali do Spojených států. Po druhé světové válce, v roce 1949, se k nim připojil a v padesátých letech vstoupil do armády. V roce 1956 se stal naturalizovaným americkým občanem. Když se Mako poprvé připojil k rodičům v USA, studoval architekturu. Během vojenské služby v sobě objevil divadelní talent a trénoval v Pasadena Community Playhouse. Mako byl ženatý s herečkou Shizuko Hoshi, s níž měl dvě dcery (obě jsou herečky) a tři vnoučata.

岩松信（1933年12月10日－2006年7月21日）（日文名：マコ 岩松 ，英文名：Makoto "Mako" Iwamatsu），出生于日本神户市，出名于美国的日裔美籍演员。

岩松信的父亲是儿童书作者和插画家。孩提时随父母移居美国，二战结束之后的1949年，他也来到了美国并和父母相聚。1950年代，他加入美军，1956年成为美国公民。

早年学习建筑，当他在美国陆军服役时，军方发现他是一个戏剧天才，于是送他在帕萨迪纳社区剧场进行培训。

2006年7月21日，因食道癌在美国加州洛杉矶病逝。
data.name: 岩松信

data.biography:
Nolan North (born October 31, 1970) is an American actor and voice actor. He is known for his roles as Nathan Drake in the Uncharted video game series, Desmond Miles in the Assassin's Creed video game series, Dr. Edward Richtofen in the Call of Duty Zombies mode, Deadpool in various Marvel Comics media, and the Penguin in the Batman: Arkham franchise.

North was born in New Haven, Connecticut. He attended the University of Connecticut, where he studied theater. After graduating, he moved to Los Angeles to pursue a career in acting.

North's first major voice acting role was as Nathan Drake in the 2007 video game Uncharted: Drake's Fortune. He has since reprised the role in four sequels, as well as the spin-off game Uncharted: The Lost Legacy.

North has also voiced a wide variety of other characters in video games, including Desmond Miles in the Assassin's Creed series, Dr. Edward Richtofen in the Call of Duty Zombies mode, Deadpool in various Marvel Comics media, and the Penguin in the Batman: Arkham franchise.

In addition to his voice acting work, North has also appeared in several live-action television shows and films, including The X-Files, CSI: Miami, and The Penguins of Madagascar.

North is 6 feet tall.
data.name: Nolan North

data.biography:
Vincent Peter Jones (born 5 January 1965) is a British actor, presenter, and former professional footballer.

Jones played professionally as a defensive midfielder from 1984 to 1999, notably for Wimbledon, Leeds United, Sheffield United, Chelsea, and Queens Park Rangers. He also played for and captained the Welsh national team, having qualified through a Welsh grandparent. Best remembered for his time at Wimbledon as a pivotal member of the famous "Crazy Gang", he won the 1988 FA Cup final with the London side, a club for which he played over 200 games during two spells between 1986 and 1998. He played 184 games in the Premier League, in which he scored 13 goals. Jones gained a reputation for being one of the hardest footballers in history, with his highly aggressive and physically uncompromising style of play, an image which has often led to him being typecast in his film career as violent criminals and thugs.

As an actor, his film and television career began with Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels (1998), for which he won an Empire Award for Best Newcomer. Then, for Snatch (2000), he won the Empire Award for Best British Actor. Other notable credits include Gone in 60 Seconds (2000), Mean Machine (2001), EuroTrip (2004), Extras (2005), X-Men: The Last Stand (2006), The Riddle (2007), The Midnight Meat Train (2008), Year One (2009), The Cape (2011), Fire with Fire (2012), The Musketeers (2014), MacGyver (2016), NCIS: Los Angeles (2019), The Big Ugly (2020) and The Gentlemen (2024).

data.biography:
Vincent Peter Jones 1965 január 5-én született az angliai Watfordban, Hertfordshire-ben. Jones profi futball-játékosként kezdte pályafutását 1984-ben, játszott Wimbledonban, a Leeds Unitedben, a Sheffield Unitedben, Chelsea-ben és a Queen Park Rangersben, nemzetközi meccseken pedig Wales-t képviselte anyai nagyszülei révén.

A masszív fizikumáról és vadságáról ismert focistát először A Ravasz, az Agy és két füstölgő puskacső (1998) című vígjátékban láthatta először a közönség, ezt követően több filmkészítő is felfigyelt a karakteres Vinnie-re. Amerikában a Tolvajtempó (2000) remake-jében ismerték meg a nevét, ami után felpörgött a színészi karrierje is.

Jones játszott Guy Ritchie következő kasszasikerében, a Blöffben (2000), melyben olyan sztárok mellet láthattuk, mint Brad Pitt és Jason Statham. Ezt követte a Kardhal (2001), a Gépállat SC (2001) vagy az Euro túra (2004).

A színész 2006-ban szerepet kapott az X-Men: Az ellenállás vége (2006) című képregény adaptációban, de játszott vígjátékban (Micsoda srác ez a lány, 2006), független filmben (The Riddle, 2007),  valamint láthattuk a japán Survive Style 5+ (2004) című filmben is.

Az elmúlt években Jones számtalan produkcióban tűnt fel. Ezek közé tartozik az Éjféli etetés (2008), a Hell Ride - Pokoljárás (2008), Legend of the Bog (2009) és A nehézfiú (2010). 2011-ben 8 filmje került a mozikban, de ezek után sem tétlenkedett, még a Magic Boys (2012) című magyar vígjátékban is játszott.

Legutóbbi nagy dobása a Szupercella (2013) volt, melyben Sylvester Stallone és Arnold Schwarzenegger oldalán láthattuk.  Jones magánélete habitusától eltérően meglehetősen nyugodt. 1994-ben vette feleségül Tanya Jones-t, akivel két gyermeket nevelnek. A színész feleségével és lányával jelenleg Los Angelesben él.

Zaczynał karierę w 1986 r jako piłkarz w pierwszoligowym Wimbledon FC uzyskując sławę dzięki agresywnej grze. Podczas sportowej kariery publikował kilka tekstów w "The Sun". Swoje drugie powołanie odkrył po spotkaniu z reżyserem i scenarzystą Guyem Ritchie. Ostatecznie w 1999 r zostawił piłkę nożną i zajął się aktorstwem, choć z powodu charakterystycznej atletycznej budowy, powierza mu się głównie role zbirów, gangsterów i innych czarnych charakterów.

文森特·彼得·琼斯（Vincent Peter “Vinnie” Jones，1965年1月5日-）是一位退役的英国足球运动员和电影演员。

琼斯代表威尔士国家足球队并担任队长，通过威尔士祖父母获得资格。他还曾效力于切尔西和利兹联。作为“疯狂帮”的一员，琼斯随温布尔登赢得了1988年足总杯决赛。琼斯出现在英国游戏的第 7 个也是最后一个系列中，名人老大哥在戴恩·鲍尔斯和亚历克斯·里德之后获得第三名。

他利用了自己作为足球运动员的硬汉形象，并以其咄咄逼人的风格和令人生畏的举止而闻名，经常被塑造成教练、流氓和暴力罪犯的角色。
data.name: 维尼·琼斯

data.biography: Vincent Peter „Vinnie“ Jones (* 5. Januar 1965 in Watford, England) ist ein ehemaliger britischer Fußballspieler. Nebenbei spielte Jones in einigen Fernsehrollen, hatte eigene Radioshows und schrieb sechs Jahre lang für eine große englische Zeitung. Später wurde ihm von Guy Ritchie eine Rolle in dem Film Bube, Dame, König, grAS angeboten, die er annahm. Er entschied sich 1999 dazu, seine aktive Fußballkarriere zu beenden, um sich ganz auf die Schauspielerei zu konzentrieren. Hohen Bekanntheitsgrad als Schauspieler erreichte er in seiner zweiten Rolle für Guy Ritchie in dem Film Snatch – Schweine und Diamanten. Jones erwies sich als Naturtalent und erhielt viele Auszeichnungen (darunter „Best Newcomer from the Odeon Cinemas’ People’s Choice Awards“, „Best Debut Performance from the Variety Club of Great Britain“ und „Empire Magazine’s Best Newcomer“). Er spielte u. a. in den Filmen Nur noch 60 Sekunden und Passwort: Swordfish mit und schloss 2002 einen Vertrag über sechs Filmrollen mit Morgan Freeman ab. Zudem war er in dem Film Mean Machine zu sehen, in dem er den Ex-Kapitän der englischen Nationalmannschaft spielt, der wegen Körperverletzung im Gefängnis sitzt. In dem Film Eurotrip agierte er als Anführer der Hooligans von Manchester United. In X-Men 3 spielt er die Rolle des Juggernaut. 2008 übernahm er eine Rolle in dem Horrorfilm The Midnight Meat Train. In der Doku-Reihe Toughest Cops begleitete er Polizisten in verschiedenen Ländern bei ihrer täglichen Arbeit. 2024 spielte er in der Netflix-Serie The Gentlemen abermals unter dem Regisseur Guy Ritchie.

文森特·彼得·瓊斯（Vincent Peter “Vinnie” Jones，1965 年 1 月 5 日-）是一位退役的英國足球運動員和電影演員。

瓊斯代表威爾士國家足球隊並擔任隊長，透過 透過 透過 透過 通過威爾士祖父母獲得資格。他還曾效力於切爾西和利茲聯。作為“瘋狂幫”的一員，瓊斯隨温布爾登贏得了 1988 年足總盃決賽。瓊斯出現在英國遊戲的第 7 個也是最後一個系列中，名人老大哥在戴恩·鮑爾斯和亞歷克斯·里德之後獲得第三名。

他利用了自己作為足球運動員的硬漢形象，並以其咄咄逼人的風格和令人生畏的舉止而聞名，經常被塑造成教練、流氓和暴力罪犯的角色。

data.biography:
Vincent Peter Jones, 5 Ocak 1965 tarihinde Watford, Hertfordshire, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Oyunculuk kariyerinden önce, İngiliz futbolunun en renkli ve tartışmalı figürlerinden biri olarak tanındı. Profesyonel futbol kariyerine 1984 yılında başlayan Jones, özellikle Wimbledon FC'nin "Crazy Gang" lakaplı efsanevi kadrosunun en önemli parçalarından biri oldu ve takımıyla 1988 FA Cup şampiyonluğu yaşadı. Sahadaki agresif ve korkusuz oyun tarzıyla "sert adam" imajını pekiştiren oyuncu, Leeds United, Sheffield United ve Chelsea gibi kulüplerde de forma giydi ve Galler Milli Takımı'nın kaptanlığını yaptı.

Futbol sahalarındaki sert imajı, sinema dünyasının dikkatini çekmesini sağladı. 1998 yılında, İngiliz yönetmen Guy Ritchie'nin suç komedisi klasiği "Ateşten Kalbe, Akıldan Dumana" (Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels) filmindeki Big Chris rolüyle beyazperdeye şaşırtıcı ve etkileyici bir giriş yaptı. Hiçbir oyunculuk eğitimi olmamasına rağmen sergilediği doğal performans, ona hemen ardından Ritchie'nin bir diğer kült filmi "Kapışma"da (Snatch) (2000) Brad Pitt ve Jason Statham ile birlikte rol alma fırsatı getirdi. Buradaki "Bullet Tooth Tony" karakteri, Jones'un sinemadaki yerini sağlamlaştırdı. Aynı yıl, Hollywood'a hızlı bir geçiş yaparak Nicolas Cage ve Angelina Jolie ile "60 Saniye" (Gone in 60 Seconds) (2000) filminde "The Sphinx" karakterini canlandırdı.

2000'ler boyunca Jones, genellikle sert mizaçlı, tehditkâr veya kara mizah unsurları taşıyan karakterleri canlandırdı. Kendi futbol geçmişine gönderme yapan hapishane filmi "Mean Machine"de (2001) ilk başrolünü üstlendi. "EuroTrip" (2004) gibi komedi filmlerinde de yer alarak, korkutucu imajıyla dalga geçebilme yeteneğini gösterdi. Kariyerindeki en yüksek bütçeli yapımlardan biri, Marvel evreninin ikonik kötülerinden Juggernaut karakterine hayat verdiği "X-Men: Son Direniş" (X-Men: The Last Stand) (2006) filmi oldu.

Korku ve gerilim türünde de eserler veren Jones, Bradley Cooper ile "Dehşet Treni" (The Midnight Meat Train) (2008) filminde sessiz ve ürkütücü bir katili canlandırdı. Sinemanın yanı sıra televizyon dünyasında da aktif olan aktör, "Arrow", "Galavant" ve "Law & Order: Organized Crime" gibi dizilerde rol aldı. Kariyeri boyunca 100'den fazla yapımda yer alan Jones, 2024 yılında Guy Ritchie ile köklerine dönerek Netflix yapımı "The Gentlemen" dizisinde Geoff Seacombe karakteriyle izleyici karşısına çıktı ve mülk bekçisi rolüyle eleştirmenlerden övgü topladı. Futbol sahalarındaki hırçın çocuktan, Hollywood'un aranan karakter oyuncularından birine dönüşen Vinnie Jones, İngiliz sinemasının en özgün kariyer hikayelerinden birine sahiptir.

data.biography: 高山南是日本的女性聲優、歌手、旁白、作曲家，音樂組合 ES CONNEXION 與 TWO-MIX 的主唱，本名為新井泉。出身於東京都足立區，所屬公司為 81Produce。
data.name: 高山南

data.biography: 高山南，日本女性聲優、歌手。中學時代加入向日葵劇團。高中畢業後，曾經是一個普通的 OL (辦公室女職員)，22 歲立志成為聲優。高山南是個多才多藝的聲優，聲線較為渾厚，擅長反串男聲。出演過同樣為青山剛昌的《劍勇傳説 YAIBA》中的鐵劍，倍受青山青睞。在名偵探柯南中既表現出作為名偵探工藤新一的犀利，又有作為江戶川柯南時的孩稚聲音——高超的演技讓人佩服不已，在《人氣歌手綁架事件》中還出演了自己本人。與柯南相反，唱歌可是相當好的——雖然在出演的時候變成了柯南那樣的音痴。
data.name: 高山南

data.biography: Lau Shun was born on 10 April 1939 in Beijing, Republic of China. He is an actor, known for The Grandmaster (2013), Tai Chi Master (1993) and To Be Number One (1991).
data.name: Lau Shun

data.biography: 刘洵，香港演员。京剧演员出身，现为香港演艺学院中国戏曲课程统筹及艺术指导。有“千面如来”之称。 演艺生涯 戏曲 刘洵六岁突袭学习京剧，进入专门教京剧的科班，在当时没有正式的学校的背景下，只是跟师傅学京剧。其间还受李万春、尚和玉、张德俊、李少春、盖叫天等前辈教导。1958年毕业后分配到中国京剧院并任教，1980年刘洵到香港发展，原因是不满当时实质的官僚主义风气。赴港后刘洵在香港演艺学院任讲师，从事粤剧研究。尤声普、罗家英、李奇峰、陈好逑、李龙、尹飞燕、陈嘉鸣等都曾受他指导。 1986年徐克的电影《刀马旦》中刘洵被聘为戏曲指导。回到大陆后，刘洵进入电影界。1987年他拍摄了层次第一部电影《僵尸至尊》，后来又多次与徐克等合作，在近百部电影中饰配角。有多年戏曲舞台经验的他在文武戏中都可以发挥，正邪两面亦都可出演。 进入21世纪后刘洵主要与各粤剧剧团共同改编及导演舞台戏曲。
data.name: 刘洵

data.biography:
劉洵，香港演員。京劇演員出身，現為香港演藝學院中國戲曲課程統籌及藝術指導。有“千面如來”之稱。

演藝生涯 戲曲 劉洵六歲突襲學習京劇，進入專門教京劇的科班，在當時沒有正式的學校的背景下，只是跟師傅學京劇。其間還受李萬春、尚和玉、張德俊、李少春、蓋叫天等前輩教導。1958 年畢業後分配到中國京劇院並任教，1980 年劉洵到香港發展，原因是不滿當時實質的官僚主義風氣。赴港後劉洵在香港演藝學院任講師，從事粵劇研究。尤聲普、羅家英、李奇峯、陳好逑、李龍、尹飛燕、陳嘉鳴等都曾受他指導。

1986 年徐克的電影《刀馬旦》中劉洵被聘為戲曲指導。回到大陸後，劉洵進入電影界。1987 年他拍攝了層次第一部電影《殭屍至尊》，後來又多次與徐克等合作，在近百部電影中飾配角。有多年戲曲舞台經驗的他在文武戲中都可以發揮，正邪兩面亦都可出演。

進入 21 世紀後劉洵主要與各粵劇劇團共同改編及導演舞台戲曲。
data.name: 劉洵
